title: 10 Best Things To Do in Marrakech
author: Merrakechy Tours
excerpt: Discover the top 10 experiences every visitor must have in Marrakech.
content: Marrakech is one of the most vibrant cities in the world.
## 1. Explore Djemaa el-Fna
The heart of Marrakech, this UNESCO-listed square comes alive at sunset.
## 2. Visit the Majorelle Garden
A stunning blue garden created by French painter Jacques Majorelle.
## 3. Take a Quad Bike Tour
Race through the Palmeraie on a guided quad bike adventure.
## 4. Ride a Camel
A timeless experience connecting you with Berber traditions.
## 5. Hot Air Balloon at Sunrise
Drift above the Atlas Mountains as the sun rises.

title: Marrakech to Sahara Desert: The Ultimate Guide
author: Merrakechy Tours
excerpt: Everything you need to know about a Sahara desert trip from Marrakech.
content: The Sahara Desert is one of the most iconic destinations in Morocco.
## Getting There
The route goes through the High Atlas Mountains via the Tichka Pass.
## How Long Does It Take?
The drive from Marrakech to Merzouga takes approximately 8-10 hours.
## What to Expect
Camel rides at sunset, sleeping under the stars in a Berber camp.
## Best Time to Visit
October to April is the best time. Summer temperatures exceed 45 degrees.
